title: Syndesis: pose-coupled native-interaction weighting for kinase ensemble docking
description: Reproducible structure-based workflow for pose-coupled GNINA and target-native interaction weighting, with an ATP-site-only EGFR prior, EGFR and CDK2 enrichment controls, deterministic analog auditing, and replicated MD pose-stability testing. Analysis-ready pose fingerprints, permutation draws, prospective inputs, ligand parameters, GROMACS topologies, replicate metrics, figures, and manuscript sources are included; large trajectories and third-party tools are excluded.
